message:
refactor(codegen): Consolidate operator maps into unified OperatorConfig

Add OperatorConfig struct to shared_maps.zig as single source of truth
for all operator-to-method mappings across BigInt, UnifiedInt, and
PyValue type contexts. Replaces 4 separate maps with one unified map.

Changes:
- Add OperatorConfig struct with bigint/unified/pyvalue/zig_op fields
- Add helper functions: getBigIntOp, getUnifiedIntOp, getPyValueOp
- Update bigint_ops.zig to use shared_maps.getBigIntOp()
- Update unified_int_ops.zig to use shared_maps.getUnifiedIntOp()
- Update pyvalue_ops.zig to use shared_maps.getPyValueOp()
- Update arithmetic.zig exports for new function names

Single source of truth for operator naming conventions across contexts.
